titles.ar: باب فِي أَنَّ صَاحِبَ الْكَبِيرَةِ يُقْتَلُ فِي الثَّالِثَةِ
titles.en: Chapter 12 – Regarding the committer of the major sins, he should be killed during the third (offence)

titles.ar: باب فِي أَنَّ صَاحِبَ الْكَبِيرَةِ يُقْتَلُ فِي الثَّالِثَةِ
titles.en: Chapter 12 – Regarding the committer of the major sins, he should be killed during the third (offence)

segments: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الزَّانِي إِذَا زَنَى جُلِدَ ثَلَاثاً وَ يُقْتَلُ فِي الرَّابِعَةِ يَعْنِي إِذَا جُلِدَ ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ .
arabic.text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الزَّانِي إِذَا زَنَى جُلِدَ ثَلَاثاً وَ يُقْتَلُ فِي الرَّابِعَةِ يَعْنِي إِذَا جُلِدَ ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ubeyd, from Yunus, from Is’haq Bin Ammar, from Abu Baseer who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The adulterer, when he commits adultery would be whipped three times (after three offences), and he would be killed during the fourth, meaning when he has (already) been whipped three times’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ubeyd, from Yunus, from Is’haq Bin Ammar, from Abu Baseer who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The adulterer, when he commits adultery would be whipped three times (after three offences), and he would be killed during the fourth, meaning when he has (already) been whipped three times’.

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِيسَى بْنِ عُبَيْدٍ عَنْ يُونُسَ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ قَالَ

titles.ar: باب فِي أَنَّ صَاحِبَ الْكَبِيرَةِ يُقْتَلُ فِي الثَّالِثَةِ
titles.en: Chapter 12 – Regarding the committer of the major sins, he should be killed during the third (offence)

segments: أَصْحَابُ الْكَبَائِرِ كُلِّهَا إِذَا أُقِيمَ عَلَيْهِمُ الْحَدُّ مَرَّتَيْنِ قُتِلُوا فِي الثَّالِثَةِ .
arabic.text: أَصْحَابُ الْكَبَائِرِ كُلِّهَا إِذَا أُقِيمَ عَلَيْهِمُ الْحَدُّ مَرَّتَيْنِ قُتِلُوا فِي الثَّالِثَةِ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Safwan, from Yunus,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al Hassan ‘Al-Maazy’ (the 7th Imamasws) having said: ‘The committers of the major sins, all of them, when the Penalty (Hadd) is established twice upon them, they would be killed (after) the third’.
en.hubeali.text: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Safwan, from Yunus, (It has been narrated) from Abu Al Hassan ‘Al-Maazy’ (the 7th Imamasws) having said: ‘The committers of the major sins, all of them, when the Penalty (Hadd) is established twice upon them, they would be killed (after) the third’.

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ عَنْ يُونُسَ عَنْ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الْمَاضِي ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ
